description: Top exterior colors of currently registered passenger cars. Use when user asks popular car colors, count of red/white/black cars. 'Ukendt' means unknown/not recorded.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejFarveStruktur.FarveTypeStruktur.FarveTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY color = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejFarveStruktur.FarveTypeStruktur.FarveTypeNavn.keyword | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 15
